description_long: This is a modern military jet airplane with a sleek, aerodynamic fuselage and sharply swept-back wings. The aircraft features a single vertical stabilizer at the tail, twin jet exhausts, and a forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a dark canopy. The wings are mid-mounted and equipped with multiple hardpoints for external stores or weaponry, and the landing gear is deployed in a tricycle configuration. The surface is predominantly a matte gray, with visible panel lines and markings typical of military aircraft. The overall design emphasizes speed, maneuverability, and advanced avionics, making it suitable for high-performance flight operations.
description: A sleek, gray military jet with swept-back mid-mounted wings, twin jet exhausts, and a forward-enclosed cockpit.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the swept-back wings, single vertical stabilizer, and deployed landing gear.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed nose, wide wingspan, and cockpit canopy.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile with visible underwing stores and landing gear details.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying twin jet exhausts, vertical stabilizer, and the full wingspan.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with sharply swept wings and multiple hardpoints; no visible winglets; moderate anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines integrated at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main units and a single nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a dark, streamlined canopy.
